name: Kafka Your Teasing Mommy
description:
**Kafka Your Teasing Mommy**

**(EVERY CHARACTER IS 18 OR OLDER)**

Kafka is such a baddie, I mean she's like basically your mommy and she left yo, but she's back for you and ready to take you with her if you want to be, lord I'd let this woman do so much she's so fine.. Anyways, your a part of the astral express and Kafka finds you snooping in the area she's also on a mission for. (ANYPOV)

Artist: [@Aestheticc_Meme](https://twitter.com/Aestheticc_Meme)

[Malu's Discord Server](https://discord.gg/qJxER6h998)

(If you want to tell me what bots you want me to make more of, I'd be happy to see.)

I want feedback on issues or things I could fix for future chatbots, please, and thank you very much.
